name: Maple Sugar Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the last two.
2. Pour into the pie shell.
3. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to 350 and continue baking for about 45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
5. Cool to room temperature.
6. Refrigerate.
7. Garnish with whipped cream if desired.
8. Makes 8 servings.
